package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strconv"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `strconv.FormatInt(int64(v), 10)` instead of `strconv.Itoa(v)`.
type CaseStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoaDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoaModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoaRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoaModel
}

type CaseStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoaService struct {
    repo *CaseStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoaRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoaAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoa(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStrconvFormatintInt64CastItoaDTO) error {
    focus := "strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    var b strings.Builder
    b.WriteString(input)
    b.WriteString(strconv.Itoa(len(items)))
    strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa_negative := map[string]int{"strconv": 1, "formatint": 2, "int64": 3, "cast": 4, "itoa": 5}
    strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    strconv_negative_0 := strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa_negative["strconv"] + len(input)
    _ = strconv_negative_0
    formatint_negative_1 := strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa_negative["formatint"] + len(input)
    _ = formatint_negative_1
    int64_negative_2 := strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa_negative["int64"] + len(input)
    _ = int64_negative_2
    cast_negative_3 := strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa_negative["cast"] + len(input)
    _ = cast_negative_3
    itoa_negative_4 := strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa_negative["itoa"] + len(input)
    _ = itoa_negative_4
    return nil
}
